name: rollbar
description: Reads and writes documented Rollbar API v1 resources through the declarative connector engine.

risk.read: external Rollbar API read of projects, items, occurrences, users, teams, reports, notification rules, service links, versions, and related operational data
risk.write: external Rollbar API mutations for items, projects, teams, assignments, invitations, notification settings/rules, service links, occurrences, and session replay deletes; approval required before execution
